behaviors.description: Review input is limited to changed hunks, excluding unchanged file content.
behaviors.justification: The failure boundary is between diff extraction and review-input assembly. Unit tests of either module alone can pass while wiring sends full files.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real diff-parser + prompt-builder together on a fixture PR diff containing small changed hunks in large files. Assert the constructed review payload includes only added/modified hunk context and excludes unchanged sections.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are posted at correct PR diff positions.
behaviors.justification: Position mapping correctness depends on real GitHub diff semantics and API validation. Mocks can hide off-by-one/side/commit-position errors.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, execute inline-comment posting with computed positions from actual diff hunks, then read back posted review comments via API and verify each lands on the expected file/line in the PR diff view.

behaviors.description: Agent finds at least one true defect in a PR containing a known injected bug.
behaviors.justification: This is model-quality behavior, not just wiring. Correctness depends on real LLM judgment and can vary across runs.
behaviors.test_description: Use a curated PR diff with a seeded bug and a grading rubric for acceptable detections. Run the real model-based reviewer multiple times and assert at least one returned finding correctly identifies the seeded defect within allowed phrasing variance.

behaviors.description: Every summary finding has a matching posted inline comment (no orphan summary items).
behaviors.justification: The failure appears at the boundary between finding aggregation, inline-post results, and summary rendering. Single-function tests miss cross-module mismatch bugs.
behaviors.test_description: Run finding collection, inline-post orchestration, and summary generation together with a controllable comment sink (including partial post failures). Assert summary IDs/entries are a subset of successfully posted inline comments and one-to-one mapped.

behaviors.description: End-to-end run on a real PR completes: read diff, post inline comments, post summary, with no manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is a full pipeline with real external PR APIs plus agentic analysis/summarization steps in sequence. Multi-step real-agent execution is the failure boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Trigger the automation on a real repository test PR from start to finish using production-like config. Verify completion status, inline comments created, summary comment created, and cross-step artifacts (review context, finding list, posted IDs) remain consistent across the whole run.
